metadata.description: doctest: Test cases in docstrings. `python -m doctest module.py`. Documentation as tests. Here is an example to illustrate this concept with a simple Python function: ```python def add(a, b): """ Add two numbers and return the result. >>> add(2, 3) 5 >>> add(-1, 1) 0 """ return a + b ``` To run these tests, you would use: ```sh python -m doctest module.py ```

data_pointers.title: doctest
data_pointers.content_preview: doctest: Test cases in docstrings. `python -m doctest module.py`. Documentation as tests. Here is an example to illustrate this concept with a simple Python function: ```python def add(a, b): """ Add two numbers and return the result. >>> add(2, 3) 5 >>> add(-1, 1) 0 """ return a + b ``` To run these tests, you would use: ```sh python -m doctest module.py ```
